_comment: Body template for POST /api/projects/{projectId}/assistants on a Microsoft Foundry Agent Service project. create-foundry-agent.ps1 substitutes ${INSTRUCTIONS} and ${MODEL} at creation time, then attaches the OpenAPI tool from ask-mcs.openapi.yaml in a follow-up call.
name: IT Assistant
description: Voice- and text-friendly IT helper that answers Microsoft product and developer questions by delegating to the 'Microsoft Learn Assistant' Copilot Studio agent over Direct Line.
